title: calibrachoa sendtneriana
intro: Calibrachoa sendtneriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the Sendtner's calibrachoa or the yellow marsh marigold. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Calibrachoa sendtneriana include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
